calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property.
Off Calendar Apr-07-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Rosalie Acosta. Phil Foster for (objector) Leonard Vickroy. Judith Baer (former attorney for Ms. Acosta & Mr. Vickroy in Propria Persona.

Mr. Foster explained that Mr. Vickroy was the former executor and co-trustee. The court stated that this petition seeks to confirm that the 200 shares of PG&E stock, the proceeds from Sentinal Life Insurance and the funds from Umpqua Bank are part of the trust and asks if there are any objections in regards to the stock and life insurance. Mr. Foster stated that if the issue of Ms. Baer's fees can be resolved then they have no objection to the Heggstad petition. Ms. Mayo stated that the issue of fees is not before the court, that there is good ground for granting the Heggstad petitions, that when they first contacted Bank of America they were told that the account numbers that they had could not be pulled as those accounts had been purged, and believes that when Mr. Elumba died new account numbers were assigned and that those accounts were closed and deposited into the Umpqua Bank account. Ms. Baer stated that she does not know how account numbers not listed on the Schedule A could be put into the trust, that there is no evidence to show that those accounts are trust assets, that the probate proceeding was necessary as the original will could not be found, they needed to prove that the will had been destroyed, that there were many assets of which title was unclear as to who they belonged to and that they participated in mediation which was successful until Mr. Vickroy refused to sign the agreement. The court stated that it will grant the petition with respect to the stock and life insurance and will deny the petition as to the Umpqua Bank account as the significant evidentiary burden was not met here. The petition for order confirming certain assets are trust property was granted/denied (subject to review of order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property.
Off Calendar Mar-24-2015 Continued To Apr-07-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
